title: Naruto
description: A young ninja who seeks recognition from his peers and dreams of becoming the Hokage.

title: One Piece
description: Monkey D. Luffy and his pirate crew in search of the ultimate treasure, One Piece.

title: Attack on Titan
description: Humans fight for survival against giant humanoid creatures known as Titans.

title: Demon Slayer
description: A young boy becomes a demon slayer after his family is slaughtered and his sister turned into a demon.
